codeSystems.name: AttachmentTagCS
codeSystems.title: Attachment Tag CodeSystem
codeSystems.description: Codes used for semantic tagging and categorization of attachments.

codeSystems.name: ObservationTagCS
codeSystems.title: Observation Tag CodeSystem
codeSystems.description:
Codes used to qualify DiagnosticReport and Observation resources
within hierarchical parent-child result/report structures.

codeSystems.name: SNOMED_CT
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
codeSystems.description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).

codeSystems.name: DiagnosticServiceSectionId
codeSystems.title: diagnosticServiceSectionId
codeSystems.description: HL7-defined code system of concepts which specify a section of a diagnostic service where the observation may be performed.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the OBR and OM4 segments.
